yandex_services.click_behavior: The Moonn page opens the official Yandex Services rating URL in a new tab, locally marks the rating button as opened, and scrolls the visitor to the Moonn text-review form. The Moonn page cannot automatically submit or verify the Yandex rating.
expected_behavior: official Yandex Services page opens in a new tab
Moonn page marks the rating action as opened and moves the visitor to the text review step
visitor leaves a star rating in Yandex
visitor returns to Moonn page and can leave a text comment in Moonn-controlled flow

moonn_comment_flow.reason: The owner requested immediate publication for the first production version; the backend still keeps consent, validation, honeypot, admin hide, and length limits.

allowed_now: generate QR code for the Moonn funnel URL
prepare homepage reviews banner entry with QR and leave-review CTA
publish review funnel into the existing /otzivi T123 record while preserving YClients widget
verified: live /otzivi raw HTML contains moonn-review-funnel and the Apps Script endpoint
live homepage contains moonn-reviews-home-banner with read and leave-review actions
test Moonn review was submitted through the public /otzivi form
test Moonn review appeared on the public page and in the backend list
test Moonn review was hidden through the admin endpoint and disappeared after live page reload
Yandex rating CTA points to the official uslugi.yandex.ru URL; no artificial Yandex rating was submitted

strategic_assessment.risk_of_obsolete_solution: high if QR points only to Yandex and text reviews continue to disappear
strategic_assessment.stronger_architecture: two-channel funnel: official Yandex rating plus own moderated Moonn text-review intake
strategic_assessment.reuse: same manifest/block pattern can be reused for lectures, consultations, Timepad follow-ups, and Telegram campaigns
strategic_assessment.three_to_twelve_month_risk_if_skipped: lost text feedback, weak proof layer on Moonn, manual copying from messengers, and no controlled moderation queue

compliance_notes: The Moonn page must not pretend to be an official Yandex interface.
The Yandex rating action must open the official Yandex Services URL.
Moonn text comments must be collected with consent and moderation before publication.
Do not promise that a submitted Yandex text review will be published by Yandex.
